message:
fix(ui): Add CRT overlay z-index below modals to prevent content obstruction

When background effects (scanlines, vignette, noise) were enabled, the CRT
overlay was rendering at z-index 900 (--z-overlay) which placed it above
modal dialogs at z-index 500 (--z-modal). This made modal content nearly
invisible when background effects were turned on.

Solution: Add a new z-index tier specifically for CRT effects:
- --z-crt: 350 (positioned between --z-fixed: 300 and --z-modal-backdrop: 400)

This ensures the CRT overlay provides its visual atmosphere behind all
interactive UI elements while still appearing above fixed navigation.

Z-index stack (bottom to top):
- z-fixed (300): Fixed navigation
- z-crt (350): CRT effects ← NEW
- z-modal-backdrop (400): Modal dimming layer
- z-modal (500): Modal dialogs
- z-popover (600): Popovers
- z-tooltip (700): Tooltips

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
